mapper.select: select member_id from members where member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID, s.TITLE AS SCH_TITLE, s.START_AT, s.IS_SHARED, p.TITLE AS PLACE_TITLE, p.ADDR1, p.FIRST_IMAGE, v.VISIT_ORDER FROM MY_SCHEDULE s JOIN VISIT_ITEM v ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE s.USER_ID = #{user_id} UNION SELECT s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID, s.TITLE AS SCH_TITLE, s.START_AT, s.IS_SHARED, p.TITLE AS PLACE_TITLE, p.ADDR1, p.FIRST_IMAGE, v.VISIT_ORDER FROM MY_SCHEDULE s JOIN VISIT_ITEM v ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{user_id} ORDER BY START_AT DESC, VISIT_ORDER ASC
